Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rhalia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Rhalia is a woman with bright yellow hair and metallic gold eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Rhalia has the ability to levitate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Rhalia's role is to guide Alin and test him to see if he is ready.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Rhalia cannot fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Rhalia has golden eyes and hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Rhalia can separate a person's mind from their body.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Rhalia is Alin's guide to the City of Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Rhalia is guiding Alin through Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Rhalia explains that certain powers require specific virtues to handle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Rhalia warned that controlling power leads to the power controlling you.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Rhalia previously described silver light to Alin.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Rhalia is a character who advises Alin to use the Silver Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Rhalia said nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Rhalia was formerly an Incarnation and a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Rhalia is a Traveler and a ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Rhalia is in a Gate next to Alin and has golden hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Rhalia was whispering advice to Alin from his Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Rhalia noted that five Incarnations could bring down the walls of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Rhalia has a white-robed form and a red-clad sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Rhalia drifts next to Alin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
